description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features two tall, curved ramps on either side, connected by a flat central platform, and is surrounded by metal safety railings along the top edges. The exterior walls are covered in colorful graffiti art, adding an urban, street-culture aesthetic. One side includes a staircase with a landing, providing access to the upper platform for skaters. The ramp surface appears well-worn, with visible scuff marks and patches, indicating frequent use. The overall construction is robust, designed to withstand heavy impacts and support multiple users at once.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with graffiti-covered walls, metal railings, and a staircase for access. The structure is robust and designed for skateboarding or similar activities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graffiti-covered wall, central opening, and the staircase leading to the upper platform.
description_view_1: Top-down view into the half-pipe, highlighting the curved ramp surfaces and the flat central platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain graffiti wall, the back of the staircase, and the absence of the central opening.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the staircase, the full depth of the half-pipe, and the graffiti details on the ramp's side.
